revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} ==Purpose== This template allows for the easy citing and linking to of [[constitution]]s.
==Syntax==
===Horizontal=== <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{cite constitution |article= |clause= |section= |polity= |date= }}</syntaxhighlight>
===Vertical=== <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{cite constitution | article = | clause = | section = | polity = | date = }}</syntaxhighlight>
==Examples==
===All required parameters=== <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{cite constitution | article = IV | section = 1 | polity = Puerto Rico | ratified = 1952 }}</syntaxhighlight>
will display as:
{{cite constitution | article = IV | section = 1 | polity = Puerto Rico | date = 1952 }}
===Amendments=== <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{cite constitution | amendment = 12 | polity = United States | date = 1804 }}</syntaxhighlight>
will display as:
{{cite constitution | amendment = 12 | polity = United States | date = 1804 }}
===With additional parameters=== <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{cite constitution | article=XIV |section=7 |polity=the Philippines |date=1987 |url=https://www.officialgazette.gov.ph/constitutions/the-1987-constitution-of-the-republic-of-the-philippines/the-1987-constitution-of-the-republic-of-the-philippines-article-xiv/ |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170609073807/https://www.officialgazette.gov.ph/constitutions/the-1987-constitution-of-the-republic-of-the-philippines/the-1987-constitution-of-the-republic-of-the-philippines-article-xiv/ |archive-date=June 9, 2017 |access-date=February 11, 2023 |website=[[Official Gazette of the Republic of the Philippines]]}}</syntaxhighlight>
will display as:
{{cite constitution | article=XIV |section=7 |polity=the Philippines |date=1987 |url=https://www.officialgazette.gov.ph/constitutions/the-1987-constitution-of-the-republic-of-the-philippines/the-1987-constitution-of-the-republic-of-the-philippines-article-xiv/ |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170609073807/https://www.officialgazette.gov.ph/constitutions/the-1987-constitution-of-the-republic-of-the-philippines/the-1987-constitution-of-the-republic-of-the-philippines-article-xiv/ |archive-date=June 9, 2017 |access-date=February 11, 2023 |website=[[Official Gazette of the Republic of the Philippines]]}}
==Parameters== {| class="wikitable sortable" ! style="text-align: left" | Parameter ! style="text-align: left" | Description ! style="text-align: left" | Requirement |- | {{code|amendment}} | amendment of the constitution where the citation resides | '''semi-required''' |- | {{code|article}} | article of the constitution where the citation resides | '''semi-required''' |- | {{code|clause}} | clause within the article of the constitution where the citation resides | ''optional'' |- | {{code|section}} | section within the article of the constitution where the citation resides | ''optional'' |- | {{code|polity}} | political entity ([[polity]]) of the constitution being cited | '''required''' |- | {{code|date}} | date the constitution was ratified; can be year only | '''required''' |- | {{code|url}} | an external site with the text (required if {{code|website}} or {{code|archive-url}} or {{code|archive-date}} or {{code|access-date}} or {{code|via}} are used) | ''optional'' |- | {{code|website}} | the website publishing the text (requires {{code|url}}) | ''optional'' |- | {{code|archive-url}} | an external archive site with the text (requires {{code|url}} and {{code|archive-date}}) | ''optional'' |- | {{code|archive-date}} | date on which the archive was made (requires {{code|url}} and {{code|archive-url}}) | ''optional'' |- | {{code|access-date}} | the last date on which the site was verified to be operational (requires {{code|url}}) | ''optional'' |- | {{code|via}} | the website hosting the text (if different from {{code|website}}, requires {{code|url}}) | ''optional'' |- |} ==TemplateData == {{Template:TemplateData header}} <templatedata> { "params": { "amendment": { "suggested": true, "label": "Amendment", "description": "Amendment of the constitution where the citation resides" }, "article": { "required": true, "suggested": true, "label": "Article", "description": "Article of the constitution where the citation resides" }, "section": { "suggested": true, "label": "Section", "description": "Section within the article of the constitution where the citation resides" }, "clause": { "suggested": true, "label": "Clause", "description": "Clause within the article of the constitution where the citation resides" }, "polity": { "required": true, "suggested": true, "aliases": [ "country" ], "label": "Political", "description": "Political entity (polity) of the constitution being cited" }, "date": { "required": true, "suggested": true, "aliases": [ "ratified" ], "label": "Date", "description": "Date the constitution was ratified; can be year only" }, "url": { "required": false, "suggested": false, "label": "URL", "description": "an external site with the text" }, "website": { "required": false, "suggested": false, "aliases": [ "work" ], "label": "Website", "description": "the website publishing the text" }, "archive-url": { "required": false, "suggested": false, "aliases": [ "archiveurl" ], "label": "Archive URL", "description": "an external archive site with the text" }, "archive-date": { "required": false, "suggested": false, "aliases": [ "archivedate" ], "label": "Archive date", "description": "date on which the archive was made" }, "access-date": { "required": false, "suggested": false, "aliases": [ "accessdate" ], "label": "Access date", "description": "the last date on which the site was verified to be operational" }, "via": { "required": false, "suggested": false, "label": "Via", "description": "the website hosting the text (if different from website)" } }, "format": "inline", "description": "For citing and linking to constitutions of various countries." } </templatedata> <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Law citation templates]] }}</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} ==Purpose== This template allows for the easy citing and linking to of [[:en:Constitution|Constitution]]s.
==Syntax==
===Horizontal=== <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{cite constitution |article= |clause= |section= |polity= |date= }}</syntaxhighlight>
===Vertical=== <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{cite constitution | article = | clause = | section = | polity = | date = }}</syntaxhighlight>
==Examples==
===All required parameters=== <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{cite constitution | article = IV | section = 1 | polity = Puerto Rico | ratified = 1952 }}</syntaxhighlight>
will display as:
{{cite constitution | article = IV | section = 1 | polity = Puerto Rico | date = 1952 }}
===Amendments=== <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{cite constitution | amendment = 12 | polity = United States | date = 1804 }}</syntaxhighlight>
will display as:
{{cite constitution | amendment = 12 | polity = United States | date = 1804 }}
